name: Zucchini Puff-up
recipeInstructions:
This dish is light and tender—almost like a souffle. This dish pairs well with roast meats.
Combine zucchini and onion in a saucepan. Add water; cover and cook until tender, about 15 minutes. Drain thoroughly. Mash the zucchini, then add butter, salt, pepper, and horseradish. Cool.
Add egg and mix thoroughly. Pour into a greased 1-quart baking dish. Top with crumbs that have been browned in 3 tablespoons butter. Bake in an oven set to 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
